Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Blossom Music Center
Cuyahoga Falls, OH
Seating Capacity: 19200
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 22
  DMB  (21)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.10.22 - Seek Up (19:58)

Song Liberations
  6.3.12 – Everybody Wake Up (Our Finest Hour Arrives) (after 2362 days)
  6.2.18 – Smooth Rider (after 1072 days)
  5.30.25 – Dive In (after 1299 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Blossom is located on 800 naturally wooded acres and has won awards based on the architecture of the facility.

1145 W. Steels Corners Rd.
Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44223
